name: Incorrect Behavior Order
description: The product performs multiple related behaviors but in the wrong order, producing resultant weaknesses. Examples include validating input before canonicalization, performing authorization before authentication, or initializing resources after use.
detection_pattern: CONTROL or TRANSFORM nodes execute in an incorrect sequence where a security-critical operation (AUTH, CONTROL[validate], TRANSFORM[canonicalize]) occurs after the operation it should precede, allowing bypasses
